violations.text: Paper towels were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

A bucket and dishes were observed in the hand-washing sink (dessert & pizza kitchen). A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

Raw animal foods (scallops) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (sauce, cheese) in the low boy refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

Whipped cream, milk and cream were observed held at 47-53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
Sauce, salami and capicola were observed with a date mark that exceeds 7 days. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2023

Knives are stored on an unclean surface (between wall and 3 bay sink) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
Wooden boards located in the main kitchen area was not in good repair, observed splintering. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
Low boy located in the dessert area was not in good repair, ambient was observed at 47F. PIC took unit out of service. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The window frame in the pizza kitchen are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The wall junctures (door frame) in the pizza kitchen do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Inspector observed various food items not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023

Working containers of dry goods are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

The presence of flies are not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler floor, ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
The door in the kitchen area is in poor repair. Inspector observed chipped paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
The vents in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
The refrigerator in the cafe area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC took out of service. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
